query: Creed complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Creed Fragrances   is rated "Average" with 3.3 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Jun 28, 2026

Image 42: Rated 2 out of 5 stars

## Dissatisfied
My first order arrived broken, the creed box was smashed. Because I wanted to give it away I filed a complaint. I had to pay the cost of returning the item to Creed, but I was refunded. The second delivery arrived in a damaged box. The Creed packaging was fine, but it didn’t have a seal – that plastic film in which such products are usually shrink-wrapped. Without the foil, the product looks ‘cheap’ rather than like a sophisticated Eau de Toilette costing over €200. Conclusion: the customer service team are very helpful and respond quickly. The courier, DHL, managed to damage the parcel twice over a distance of around 300 km (Wrocław – Berlin). All in all, the ‘shopping experience’ leaves me with mixed feelings. [...] To allow us to investigate this matter further, please contact us via our Contact Us page, providing your order number and all relevant details. Our team will thoroughly review your experience and respond as soon as possible.

Kind regards,

Creed Fragrances Customer Care Team

JA

Jacob DE•1 review

Updated Jun 29, 2026

Image 36: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Horrible experience
Horrible experience, won’t be ordering again. I placed an order for a bottle that cost 550€. Contacted them as I couldn’t add the free samples included and they said it was something with my account and that they will look at it. However as this was a gift and I needed it to arrive in a week I ordered without the free samples included. The package came and I opened it to see they sent me a broken/damaged perfume box!!! Like seriously?! This is a gift that you want me to give in that shape! Shame! It will be sent back! Waste of time and a big disappointment

July 3, 2026

results.title: The notorious House of Creed: reviews after initial testing
results.content: - Nice write up. A couple of points: as you move into deeper layers of discussion, however, people’s defining view is that the house has sold its soul to corporate overlords, resulting in marketing campaigns with questionable historical facts and products that have been watered down to improve cost efficiency. It’s… a divisive topic, right? The overblown complaints about the “questionable historic facts” predates the sale to Black Rock. : The critical point. Honestly, having avoided some offerings that have been heavily criticized for longevity issues (e.g., Millesime Imperial), I didn’t experience many problems with Creed’s performance. The longevity is yet another exaggeration at least in my experience. If anything, they last too long for the most part. With the exception of aventus, [...] been watered down to improve cost efficiency. It's... a divisive topic, right? Overall thoughts : my opinion after sampling is that getting introduced to refined perfumery through Creed has been a great experience. If you expect that it will revolutionize your social life you get disappointed, but it is impossible not to see its superiority over the average designer scent. Quality: the richness of notes and the perceived level of quality you get in every opening far exceeds my previous experiences; not a single one smelled cheap or poorly blended. For me, this is the defining differential value of the brand. Scent profiles: the overall style of the brand fits me well, they never go anywhere close to overly sweet (the original sin) and it always smells classy and elegant. Some of the [...] sin) and it always smells classy and elegant. Some of the scents quickly became all-time favourites of mine; on the other hand, some of them did not (usually when there was too much of an old school vibe). Performance: The critical point. Honestly, having avoided some offerings that have been heavily criticized for longevity issues (e.g., Millesime Imperial), I didn't experience many problems with Creed's performance. Longevity looks to me the same deal you get with most designers. It really could be better, especially due to the price premium, but it is certainly not worse than the industry's average. Thank god projection is never huge, as I personally always prefer fragrances with limited sillage but extended duration. Obviously, the main issue here is that they appear to be watering

# Creed Customer Service Contacts

Creed is a French fragrance brand known for producing perfumes using traditional methods and ingredients.

### How to reach a person at Creed

Main: +44-2033-676-102

### Creed Responsiveness rating

  
 The Elliott Responsiveness Rating scores companies based on how responsive they are to customers. Here's more information about our ratings. Want to know which companies have the best -- and worst -- customer service? Check out our Red List and Green List.

### What you need to know about Creed

The company responds to most customer complaints in a satisfactory manner.

### How to resolve a problem with Creed [...] ### How to get professional help with your Creed problem

If you need help with Creed, you can contact our advocacy team or just click the "Get Help" button. For immediate assistance, you can also send us a message on our Facebook group. Note: We do not charge for our advocacy.

Get Help

However, they should in no way be construed as a guarantee of their accuracy by Elliott.org. Company executives change their email addresses and phone numbers frequently to avoid contact with customers.   
If an email address bounces or a phone number is wrong, please report it to us immediately through this form.

# Contact Us

Contact Us

If you've placed an order with us online, or have a question related to your Creed account, our customer service team are here to help. You can contact our dedicated team via telephone, chat or email: Monday to Friday 9:00am - 5:30pm and Saturday 9:00am - 5:00pm GMT. 

Telephone: +44 330 053 2398

Chat: Via the icon in the bottom right hand side of your screen.

Email: customerservices@creedfragrances.co.uk

Alternatively, please view our FAQ's for answers to commonly asked questions.

If you prefer, you can also send us your questions or comments by completing the form below:
